title: Tensura: Shadowfall
description: A Tensura addon focused on adding a curated selection of skills.
body:
This is an addon to the Tensura: Reincarnated mod, basically adding whatever comes to mind or whatever I think I'd like to see. Do not expect anything to be properly balanced, I make this to add random things I'd like to see, some of which very powerful, others may not be. This is my first mod and adventure learning Java, so expect frequent bugs and glitches. 

Currently there are only a few skills created, and they are not by default in the reincarnation pool.

**God Class:**
Atlas, Lord of Fortitude

**Unique:**
Void Walker, Ego

There is a utility command added.
/shadowfall assignultimate modid:skillname true/false

Basically intended for operators to more easily assign skills regardless of requirements and UUID restrictions. 

Wiki can be found in the [discord](https://discord.com/invite/rcmRSe275E).
